short_summary: James Camacho Moylan (born July 18, 1962) is an Guamanian politician and Army veteran serving as the delegate to the U.S. House of Representatives for Guam's at-large congressional district since 2023. A member of the Republican Party, he previously served as a member of the Guam Legislature from 2019 to 2023. Moylan is one of two Chamorro members of Congress, alongside Kimberlyn King-Hinds.

prior_positions.position: Minority Leader of the Guam Legislature
